---
title: "Research Overview"
---

## Current Work

This section contains the core analytical work of my thesis.

### Data Analysis

- [Python Analysis](python-analysis.qmd) - Machine learning and statistical analysis
- [R Analysis](r-analysis.qmd) - Statistical modeling and visualization
- [GIS Analysis](gis-analysis.qmd) - Spatial data analysis and mapping

### Literature Review

- [Literature Review](literature.qmd) - Key papers and theoretical framework

## Research Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Data Collection] --> B[Data Cleaning]
    B --> C[Exploratory Analysis]
    C --> D[Modeling]
    D --> E[Validation]
    E --> F[Visualization]
    F --> G[Interpretation]
```

## Key Findings

::: {.callout-important}
## Preliminary Results
Results will be updated as analysis progresses.
:::
